name: Borscht 3
recipeIngredient: 2 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into cubes
1 large onion, peeled and chopped finely
6 ripe tomatoes, peeled and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the stock, potatoes, carrots, onion, beetroot, celery, garlic, sugar, salt, and pepper to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Simmer, covered, for 30 to 40 minutes or until the vegetables are cooked.
3. Add the cabbage, tomatoes, dill, and parsley.
4. Cook for an additional 10 to 12 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and allow to stand for 10 minutes.
6. Serve in large soup plates with a teaspoon of sour cream and chopped dill.
